intended_use: Rapid NCCT Stroke is a radiological computer aided triage and notification software indicated for use in the analysis of (1) nonenhanced head CT (NCCT) images. The device is intended to assist hospita
intended_use_full: Rapid NCCT Stroke is a radiological computer aided triage and notification software indicated for use in the analysis of (1) nonenhanced head CT (NCCT) images. The device is intended to assist hospital networks and trained clinicians in workflow triage by flagging and communicating suspected positive findings of (1) head CT images for Intracranial Hemorrhage (ICH) and (2) NCCT large vessel occlusion (LVO) of the ICA and MCA-M1.
target_condition: Intracranial Hemorrhage (ICH) and Large Vessel Occlusion (LVO) of the ICA and MCA-M1 in suspected acute stroke
ground_truth: Expert reader truthing of the data based on blinded review
other_metrics: Time-to-notification: Mean 2.5 minutes (95% CI 2.4 - 2.6); Time-to-exam-open in standard of care: Mean 58.72 minutes (95% CI 51.50 - 71.23); Difference: 70.08 minutes. LVO sensitivity vs. all readers: 0.436 (difference 0.199, 95% CI: 0.055-0.34). LVO sensitivity vs. general radiologists: 0.409 (difference 0.226, 95% CI: 0.071-0.381).
